markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the scope and workflow for a new website template design project.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Project:** Create 4 unique visual variations of a base website template weekly using Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Goal:** Experiment with templates for different niches (e.g., graphic design portfolios) to gauge user interest.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**Test Workflow:** Georgemaine provides a base template on Wednesday; Bruno delivers 4 variations by the following Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Quality Standard:** All deliverables must be production-ready, with no broken links, duplicate images, or mobile layout issues.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

## Topics

### Project Goal & Scope

  - [**Objective:** Experiment with website templates for various niches to gauge user interest.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**Output:** 4 visually distinct variations of a single base template each week.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Tool:** Lovable (Bruno can use Cloud Code or in-app chat).](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Quality Standard:** Production-ready for immediate use.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [**Functional:** All links must work.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Visual:** No duplicate images or mobile layout issues.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Cohesive:** Consistent styles (typography, colors) across all pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [**Note:** Internal style guides must be removed from final deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

### Test Workflow

  - [**Rationale:** A test week will validate the weekly 4-variation commitment, as the scope is larger than Bruno's previous 2-project/day pace.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [**Wednesday:** Georgemaine provides the base template.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Monday:** Bruno delivers 4 variations.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [**Communication:** Email for the test week. A formal Notion/Slack workflow will be implemented if the test is successful.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Georgemaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [Send base template link to Bruno by Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Confirm Notion/Slack setup details with Bruno by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [**Bruno:**](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [Deliver 4 template variations via email by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/EJLgsyDZJ3B2sYdcs6ZwdHpqgXJxrqPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
